meta.intent: Ask the player to time the key ice break around dock stabilization instead of treating either system alone.
meta.expectedPath: Make one lower route-progress clear, stabilize dock with a clean triple, break the key ice, and finish the urgent rescue before pivoting.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player either delays the ice break too long while protecting dock or rushes route clears into overflow.
meta.whatItProves: Ice future value can integrate with dock timing without hiding an exact sequence.
meta.notes: Role: pressure_choice. Water and dock are both active, but the visible lower ice lane remains the primary decision.
